text: I feel as though I've wandered into a liminal, ambiguous space, one that oscillates between sterile functionality and the invitation to participate in something experimental. The vacant, angular room unsettles yet draws my curiosity, while the vivid R+D wall, with its splash of color and digital noise, amplifies the sensation that I am on the threshold of a technological and philosophical experience. The juxtaposition stimulates my mind—I am reminded of how environments shape mood, and how the fusion of art, technology, and philosophy pushes me to question my own presence and agency within this evolving world.
